summary_html: Brain fog, concentration issues, and memory gaps after 40 are driven by hormonal and neurological changes — not early dementia. This hub covers the best-evidenced nootropics for women over 40 and how to address both the neurological and hormonal roots of cognitive decline.
seo_title: Brain Health After 40 for Women: Focus, Memory, and Cognitive Clarity (2026)
seo_description: Brain fog and memory gaps after 40 are common and addressable. This complete guide covers the best nootropics for women over 40 — lion's mane, bacopa, phosphatidylserine — and how to improve concentration and cognitive clarity.
